title: cuphea fruticosa
intro: Cuphea fruticosa, also known as firecracker plant or Mexican heather, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cuphea fruticosa include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to reduce anxiety and stress levels. Cuphea fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible addition to holistic wellness routines.
